Chk_PreserveStructure: Preserve folder structure in destination folder
Diag_IncompleteCoverage: Tokenizer regex did not match the filename at position {0}.
Diag_MissingSepGroup: Tokenizer regex must define the named group 'sep'.
Diag_Separator: Pattern mismatch for '{0}', token {1}, offset {2}: expected separator '{3}', found '{4}'.
Diag_TokenCount: Pattern mismatch for '{0}': expected {1} tokens, found {2}.
Diag_TokenKind: Pattern mismatch for '{0}', token {1}, offset {2}: expected {3}, found {4} '{5}'.
Diag_Type: Pattern mismatch for '{0}', token {1}, offset {2}: value '{3}' is not type '{4}'{5}.
Diag_ZeroLength: Tokenizer regex produced a zero-length match at position {0}.
Err_AddDest: Add destination name elements on tab 4.
Err_FixPrev: errors in preview. Fix them before copying.
Err_ResolveAmbiguous: Select an unambiguous data type for field:
Err_SelFieldTab: Select a field in the table.
Err_SelFieldTrans: Select a field to add transformation to.
Err_SelectPattern: First select a pattern on tab 2 (File analysis).
Err_EmptyRuleOrPattern: Rule ID and Pattern must not be empty.
Msg_ConfirmRenameInPlace: Rename {0} file(s) in place to suggested names?
Hint_AddElements: Add destination name elements using buttons below.
Hint_SelectField: Select a field, give it a business name, and add transformations or mappings.
Msg_ConfirmRestart: Language changed. Please restart the application to fully apply the new language.
Msg_CopyOrig: files? Originals will not be modified.
Status_Ready: Ready. Select source folder and start analysis on tab 2.
Tip_TokenRegexLabel: The regex must match every filename segment. Use (?<sep>...) for separators; all other matches are values. Example: (?<value>[^_\-\s]+)|(?<sep>[_\-\s]+).
Txt_FieldHint: Select a field to edit its name, role and transformations. Fields marked with V come from mappings.
Txt_MappingHint: Mapping replaces a field value with another value from an external file. It creates a new virtual field available in destination name.
Txt_ProfileHint: Work sequentially on tabs 2-5. Select an existing profile to restore configuration.
Txt_TransformHint: Transformations modify field value in destination name (e.g., date format change, text trimming, case change).
Compliance_DateBad: Date segment is not a valid yyyyMMdd date
Compliance_AuthorReversed: Author segment reversed (GivenSurname instead of SurnameG)
Compliance_StructureBad: Name structure does not match schema (YYYYMMDD_XxxxxxxY_Zzzzz_Freitext)
Txt_CustomRulesHint: Custom type rules recognize specific data patterns (e.g. Project IDs, Revision codes). For complete guidelines and JSON examples, see CUSTOM_TYPE_RULES.md.
Msg_ConfirmRenameInPlace: Rename {0} file(s) in-place according to suggested names?
ToolTip_LanguageSelector: Select application UI display language (PL / EN / DE)
ToolTip_ThemeSelector: Select UI color theme (Dark Mode / Light Mode)
ToolTip_SourceFolder: Path to the directory containing source files to process
ToolTip_DestFolder: Destination path for renamed / moved output files
ToolTip_Recursive: Process subfolders recursively under source path
ToolTip_PreserveStructure: Recreate source folder directory tree in destination directory
ToolTip_TabCompliance: Audit and automatically standardize filenames according to enterprise convention
ToolTip_ComplianceScan: Scan source directory files against corporate naming rules
ToolTip_ComplianceExtFilter: Filter compliance audit by file extension
ToolTip_ComplianceFixSelected: Rename selected or all non-compliant files in place
ToolTip_ComplianceGrid: Displays file compliance status, violations, and suggested standard names
ToolTip_ProfileLoad: Load selected profile configuration into active session
ToolTip_ProfileDelete: Delete selected profile file from disk
ToolTip_ProfileSave: Save active fields, mappings, and output template as a named profile
ToolTip_ProfileList: List of saved JSON profile files
ToolTip_TabAnalysis: Analyze source filename structures and tokenize components
ToolTip_Analyze: Scan source directory and group files by token structure signature
ToolTip_ExtensionFilter: Filter structural analysis by file extension
ToolTip_PatternGrid: Select a filename pattern group to extract fields
ToolTip_PatternSamples: Sample filenames belonging to the selected pattern group
ToolTip_TabFields: Configure detected fields, data types, transforms, and mappings
ToolTip_FieldGrid: List of extracted fields, data types, and current role assignments
ToolTip_FieldName: Business name assigned to this field
ToolTip_FieldRole: Role of this field (Value, Date, ID, Constant, Ignore)
ToolTip_FieldType: Inferred or manually selected data type validation rule
ToolTip_FieldApply: Apply changes to selected field definition
ToolTip_TransformList: Ordered list of transformation operations applied to this field
ToolTip_TransformAdd: Add a new transformation rule to the selected field
ToolTip_MappingList: Active dictionary mapping files used for value replacement
ToolTip_MappingAdd: Add a new CSV/JSON/XML dictionary mapping rule
ToolTip_MappingUp: Move mapping rule higher in precedence
ToolTip_MappingDown: Move mapping rule lower in precedence
ToolTip_FieldSelector: Select field token or virtual metadata field to add to output template
ToolTip_OutputAddField: Append selected field to output filename template
ToolTip_OutputText: Custom static text segment to add
ToolTip_OutputAddText: Append static text segment to output template
ToolTip_OutputAddSeparator: Append separator character to output template
ToolTip_OutputList: Ordered list of components forming the target filename
ToolTip_KeepExtension: Preserve original file extension in output filename
ToolTip_NewExtension: Custom file extension for target filenames
ToolTip_TabPreview: Preview generated filenames and run copy/move operations
ToolTip_BuildPreview: Build full transformation preview grid for all matching files
ToolTip_EnforcePattern: Apply active pattern rules to all source files regardless of structural group
ToolTip_PreviewFilter: Filter preview list by status (All, Errors, Ready)
ToolTip_ExecutionMode: Choose between Copy files or Move files
ToolTip_ExportAudit: Export full preview and audit results to CSV file
ToolTip_PreviewGrid: Detailed preview grid showing source, destination, status, and details
ToolTip_TabCustomRules: Define custom regex recognition rules for enterprise data types
ToolTip_CustomRuleNew: Create a new custom type recognition rule
ToolTip_CustomRuleSaveConfig: Save custom type rules to main configuration file (config.json)
ToolTip_CustomRulesGrid: List of registered custom type rules
ToolTip_CustomRuleId: Unique alphanumeric identifier for custom rule
ToolTip_CustomRulePattern: Regular expression pattern for type matching
ToolTip_CustomRuleEnabled: Enable or disable this custom rule
ToolTip_CustomRuleAllowComposite: Allow this rule to match composite token structures
ToolTip_CustomRuleApply: Apply changes to selected custom rule
ToolTip_CustomRuleTestInput: Sample text string to test against custom rule pattern
ToolTip_CustomRuleTestBtn: Run regex pattern match against sample input text
